title: T2SCH7 Aggregate Investment Income and Income Eligible for the Small Business Deduction - Canada.ca
content:
## T2SCH7 Aggregate Investment Income and Income Eligible for the Small Business Deduction
You must download the accessible fillable PDF to your computer. Use Acrobat Reader 10 or later to open the file. Do not click the link to open it in your web browser.
- Download and save the PDF to your computer
- Open the downloaded PDF in Acrobat Reader 10 or later
This schedule is for the use of Canadian-controlled private corporations to calculate foreign
	investment income and aggregate investment income, income from an active business, and specified partnership income.

## Ways to get the form
- Download and fill out with Acrobat Reader You must download and open
				fillable PDFs in
			Acrobat Reader 10 or higher. Accessible Fillable PDF
					(t2sch7-fill-25e.pdf) Previous years: Accessible Fillable PDFs This form is also available for the years listed below: 2021 – Fillable PDF
					(t2sch7-fill-21e.pdf) 2019 –
						Fillable PDF (t2sch7-fill-19e.pdf) 2017 – Fillable PDF
						(t2sch7-fill-17e.pdf) 2015 – Fillable PDF
						(t2sch7-fill-15e.pdf) 2014 – Fillable PDF
						(t2sch7-fill-14e.pdf) 2012 – Fillable PDF
						(t2sch7-fill-12e.pdf)
